mapper.select: select id, resources_id, web_ip, web_port, xray_port, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time from server_resources_xray_valid where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into server_resources_xray_valid(id,resources_id, web_ip, web_port, xray_port, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values (#{entity.id},#{resourcesId}, #{webIp}, #{webPort}, #{xrayPort}, #{isDeleted}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})

insert into server_resources_xray_valid(id,resources_id, web_ip, web_port, xray_port, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.resourcesId}, #{entity.webIp}, #{entity.webPort}, #{entity.xrayPort}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})

insert into server_resources_xray_valid(id,resources_id, web_ip, web_port, xray_port, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.resourcesId}, #{entity.webIp}, #{entity.webPort}, #{entity.xrayPort}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})
on duplicate key update resources_id = values(resources_id), web_ip = values(web_ip), web_port = values(web_port), xray_port = values(xray_port), is_deleted = values(is_deleted), create_user = values(create_user), update_user = values(update_user), create_time = values(create_time), update_time = values(update_time)
